candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; matches Total Revenue exactly in the preview but is less subtotal-like.
Also a valid revenue line, but a subtotal/total version of Revenue.
Not the main top-line; appears to be ancillary revenue.

variables.notes: Use Revenue first; Total Revenue is a backup label if reporting changes by year.

Candidate list was empty. Chose 'Purchased Goods and Services' from the full preview as the closest direct cost / cost of sales line. Manual review requested because this was selected outside the candidate list and could, in some companies, include mixed direct/indirect costs.

candidates.why: Clear operating overhead component; typical SG&A-type personnel/admin cost.
Likely external operating/admin/service overhead bucket when no explicit SG&A subtotal exists.
Residual overhead bucket; small but valid operating expense component.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A line exists. Selected the best overhead component rows from candidates and excluded COGS-like, D&A, impairment, interest, and subtotal rows.

candidates.why: This is capitalized development, not an R&D expense line.

variables.notes: No clear R&D expense row is present. 'Activation of development expenditure' reflects capitalization rather than expensed R&D, so XRD is treated as missing.

candidates.why: Most direct and preferred pure interest expense label.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expenses and Similar income Items
candidates.why: Broader finance-cost label that appears populated when Interest Expense is missing; good fallback across years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific component of interest expense, but not the main reported line for total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental component, not preferred as primary XINT line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expenses and Similar income Items - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line should not be preferred over explicit reported interest lines.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expenses and Similar income Items

variables.notes: Priority list for changing labels over time: prefer pure Interest Expense, then broader Interest Expenses and Similar income Items if the former is unavailable.

candidates.why: Best book equity line here. Minority interest is reported separately, so using Total Equity avoids needing owner-equity-only line that is not present.
This is minority interest, not parent book equity.
Includes minority interest and would risk double counting with MIB.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing line, not an equity measure.
Total balance sheet, not equity.

variables.notes: No separate parent-only equity line is shown. 'Total Equity' is preferred over 'Rep Total Equity & Minority Interest' because minority interest is separately reported in MIB.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet minority interest / non-controlling interest line.
Also a direct NCI line; good fallback label.
Income statement allocation, not preferred for balance-sheet MIB.
Income statement allocation, not balance-sheet minority interest.
Income statement allocation, not balance-sheet minority interest.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attribution, not MIB stock.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Not minority interest.
Combined total, not standalone minority interest.

variables.notes: Priority list of balance-sheet non-controlling interest labels; both appear equivalent, with 'Minority Interest' preferred first.
